name: Microwave Leek-Bacon Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the potatoes and prick them with a fork.
2. Microwave on high for 5 minutes, then turn off.
3. Return to microwave and cook for another 5 minutes.
4. In a bowl, combine the leeks and potatoes.
5. Microwave on high for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Return to microwave and cook for an additional minute.
7. Remove the cut tops from the potatoes.
8. Scoop out the potato flesh within 1/4 inch of the sides.
9. Combine the removed potato pulp with the milk mixture in a bowl and stir well.
10. Add the Canadian bacon, leeks, and black pepper to the mashed potato mixture.
11. Spoon the filling into the potato shells.
12. Replace the tops of the potatoes.
13. Microwave on high for 1-2 minutes, or until heated through.
14. Serve hot.
